title: [FIRRTL] GCT Tap Upwards XMR Bug
body:
The following produces an invalid XMR after the new GCT Taps "minimal XMR" patch:

```scala
circuit Top :
  extmodule DataTap_1 :
    output _0 : UInt<1>
    defname = DataTap_1

  module Submodule :

    inst DataTap_1 of DataTap_1

  module DUT :

    wire _foo : UInt<1>
    _foo <= UInt<1>(0)

    inst submodule of Submodule

  module Top :

    inst dut of DUT
```

```json
[
  {
    "class":"sifive.enterprise.grandcentral.DataTapsAnnotation",
    "blackBox":"~Top|DataTap_1",
    "keys":[
      {
        "class":"sifive.enterprise.grandcentral.ReferenceDataTapKey",
        "source":"~Top|Top/dut:DUT>_foo",
        "portName":"~Top|DataTap_1>_0"
      }
    ]
  }
]
```

This produces (`firtool Top.fir -annotation-file Top.anno.json -firrtl-grand-central`) a data tap with contents:

```verilog
module DataTap_1_impl_0(
  output _0);

  assign _0 = Top._foo;
endmodule
```

The XMR should be `DUT._foo`.
